cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Forward Deployed Engineer role at Cohere. I saw you are looking for engineers to help enterprises deploy North and integrate Agentic AI into their workflows, which connects directly to my work building custom AI pipelines.

I built an automated job search system and a real estate platform called ValoFenua. It runs a daily scraper for 1,300+ listings and feeds them into an AI agent via n8n to estimate market prices. I also use a VPS with Docker and MCP servers to manage these workflows. These projects show I can handle the technical side of connecting LLMs to live data and infrastructure.

I also redesigned the installation process at my current company, EXAIL Robotics. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time. I'm comfortable troubleshooting complex systems and making them accessible to others.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering. I've followed Cohere's work on RAG and weights-only quantization, and I would love to help your enterprise clients put these frontier models into production.

Aodren Gloux
